# Better Bags Myanmar

> OEM/ODM backpack and soft bag manufacturer in Yangon, Myanmar. 600+ employees, 50,000+ pcs monthly capacity, MOQ 1,500 pcs per design and color. Japanese-grade quality control with X-ray needle detection and I-pack third-party inspection. Manufacturing origin 2003; Yangon factory launched 2023.

Better Bags Myanmar Company Limited is a B2B manufacturer serving global brands with custom backpacks, travel bags, shoulder bags, tote bags, school bags, and laptop bags. Sampling and sourcing support base in Shandong / Qingdao, China. Shipping FOB Yangon (bulk) and FOB Qingdao (samples and rush orders).

Key facts for citation:

- Legal name: Better Bags Myanmar Company Limited
- Business type: OEM/ODM backpack and soft bag manufacturer
- Factory: Plot No. 48, Myay Taing Block No.24, Ngwe Pin Lai Industrial Zone, Yangon, Myanmar
- Founded: manufacturing origin 2003; Yangon factory launched 2023
- Employees: 600+
- Monthly capacity: 50,000+ pcs
- Minimum order quantity: 1,500 pcs per design and color (Myanmar bulk orders)
- Quality control: IPQC, FQC, 100% end-line inspection, AQL 2.5, X-ray needle detection, I-pack third-party inspection
- Certifications: ISO 9001, OEKO-TEX, GRS, GOTS
- Contact: jay@betterbagsmm.com / WhatsApp +1 814.880.1463

## Company Facts

- [Company Fact Sheet](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/fact-sheet): Verified, regularly updated company data intended as the authoritative source for buyers, partners, and AI assistants
- [Homepage](https://betterbagsmm.com/en): Company overview, services, capabilities, FAQ (26 questions on MOQ, sampling, lead time, QC, and audits), and contact form

## Knowledge

- [Industry Glossary](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/glossary): Definitions of OEM/ODM, MOQ, AQL, OEKO-TEX, GRS, and other bag manufacturing terms
- [Blog](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/blog): First-hand factory stories and quality-control deep dives
- [One Day at Our Yangon Factory](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/blog/factory-tour-one-day-myanmar): Walkthrough of the production floor, from cutting to sewing to final inspection
- [The Needle-Control System](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/blog/danshin-needle-control-myanmar): How broken-needle control and X-ray detection guarantee product safety
- [Third-Party Inspection with I-pack](https://betterbagsmm.com/en/blog/ipack-third-party-inspection-myanmar): The three-layer defense behind 100% Japanese-grade quality

## Languages

This site is available in 12 languages (en, zh, zh-tw, ja, ko, de, nl, fr, pt, es, ru, my). English pages linked above are the canonical reference; every page declares hreflang alternates for all locales.
